markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Bridge Legal and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on inbound marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bridge Legal seeks to develop inbound marketing channels, currently relying on outbound for B2B customers](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services, focusing on editorial content to drive organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [GrowthX's engagement model: 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by 12-month execution phase ($15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Bridge Legal has existing brand/competitor research, potentially reducing need for initial strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Topics

### Bridge Legal's Current Marketing Approach

  - [Primarily uses outbound marketing for B2B customers (law firms and litigation funders)](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Targets large law firms, considering expansion to smaller firms](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Has a B2C marketing team, but lacks B2B inbound strategies](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Recently worked with an agency to develop brand guidelines and competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Combines AI-powered platform with expert services for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Focus on editorial-style content to build organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Typical output: 5-15 published articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Uses Airtable as a "Content OS" to manage content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Offers both strategy development and execution phases](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### Engagement Structure

1.  Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, $20K):
      - [Develop editorial roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Competitive gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Voice, tone, and structure guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [3 sample content pieces for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
2.  Growth Execution (12 months, typically $15K/month):
      - [Ongoing content production and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [Flexible pricing based on content volume needs](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### ROI and Metrics

  - [Early focus on impression and click growth](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Evolves to conversion metrics and revenue impact over time (around 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Example: Tiro (B2B dental marketplace) saw significant organic traffic growth within 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [Initially requires more client involvement for feedback and approval](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Gradually transitions to lighter touch as trust is built](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [GrowthX's managing editors ensure quality before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share more detailed information on their service structure](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up call to review opportunities and potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Bridge Legal to consider if GrowthX's approach aligns with their inbound marketing goals, given existing brand research](https://fathom.video/share/WzhBspTRs32zN3zNEDsAhrGpYBC_s6pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
